prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类/理科最低位次分别为约1745名、521名、1359名、395名、350名，整体呈剧烈波动后持续前移趋势；2024年广西首年新高考物理类最低位次39 5名，2025年进一步前移至350名，近两年累计前移约45名，2025年基准约350名；该校在广西物理类招生计划2024年20人、2025年16人；2026年计划仅7人 ，较2025年大幅缩招约56%，招生名额显著减少，理论上使竞争格局发生重大变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第14名（202 5年第13名），稳居全国Top20，近年排名持续上升，学校综合实力和品牌号召力强劲；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风事件3起（宫琳事件、 伍俊英事件、常旭强事件），但学校舆情应对较为高效；抖音热度排名第47位（较热），综合热度约83.8万，国防七子标签持续吸引关注；未见明显投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中A-及以上学科共12个，其中信息与通信工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A、机械工程A、材料科学与工程A等，与招生专业高度匹配，学科实 力对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北理工核心专业大类持续高热推荐，社会报考热度不减；广西2026年高考总考生约39.2 万人，较2025年增加约4.5%，物理类估算约26.4万人（较2025年增约1.5%），考生规模扩大使竞争略有加剧；2026年；北京理工大 学位于北京，非本省高校；2025年在广西招生占比约2.17%（13人/598人全国），属跨省招生，无本地倾斜优势。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次350名、2026年计划大幅缩 招56%使位次理论上应前移（数字减小），但学校声誉偏负面、考生总数增加及专业持续高热等因素形成对冲；，预测2026年物理类 最低位次约282名，区间232–332名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类招生计划大幅缩减至7人，竞争极为激烈。预测位次在282名左右，建议位次在232–332名区间内的考生以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（如 200名以内）可重点冲刺徐特立英才班、卓越班等王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 1745, 521, 1359, 395, and 350 respectively, showing a trend of drastic fluctuations followed by continuous advancement; in 2024, the first year of the new Gaokao in Guangxi, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was 395, and in 2025 it further advanced to 350, with a cumulative advancement of about 45 positions over the past two years, and a baseline of approximately 350 in 2025; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category was 20 in 2024 and 16 in 2025; the 2026 plan is only 7, a significant reduction of about 56% compared to 2025, with a marked decrease in enrollment quotas, theoretically causing major changes in the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 14th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (13th in 2025), firmly in the national Top 20, with a continuously rising ranking in recent years, strong comprehensive strength and brand appeal; during the 2026 Gaokao cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving 3 incidents of teacher ethics and conduct (the Gong Lin incident, the Wu Junying incident, and the Chang Xuqiang incident), but the university's public relations response has been relatively efficient; Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 838,000, and the label of 'Seven Sons of National Defense' continues to attract attention; no obvious records of enrollment gaps; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 12 disciplines rated A- or above, including Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, etc., which highly match the enrollment majors, and the disciplinary strength strongly attracts high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core majors of Beijing Institute of Technology such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended and popular among applicants; the total number of Gaokao candidates in Guangxi in 2026 is approximately 392,000, an increase of about 4.5% compared to 2025, with Physics Category estimated at about 264,000 (an increase of about 1.5% from 2025), leading to slightly intensified competition due to the larger candidate pool; in 2026; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, not a local university in Guangxi; in 2025, its enrollment proportion in Guangxi was about 2.17% (13 out of 598 nationwide), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without local preferential advantages.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 350, the significant reduction of 56% in the 2026 plan theoretically should cause the ranking to advance (decrease in number), but factors such as the somewhat negative reputation of the university, the increase in total candidates, and the continued high popularity of majors create a counterbalance; it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 282, with a range of 232–332.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the enrollment plan for Physics Category is significantly reduced to 7, making competition extremely intense. The predicted ranking is around 282. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the 232–332 range focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch; candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 200) can focus on aiming for flagship majors such as the Xu Teli Elite Class and Excellence Class.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category in 2024–2025 were approximately 800 and 633, respectively. In 2025, the ranking moved forward by about 167 places compared to 2024, a significant forward shift, with a baseline of approximately 633 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi was 17 students in 2024 and 17 in 2025; in 2026, the plan is 21 students, an expansion of about 23.5% compared to 2025. The increase in enrollment slots theoretically eases competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 14th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly in the national Top 20, with strong overall strength. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics and conduct. Douyin popularity ranking is 47th (relatively hot). No abnormal admission records for History Category have been observed. Beijing Institute of Technology's advantageous disciplines are mainly engineering, while the History Category enrollment majors are Social Science Experimental Classes (Humanities and Social Sciences direction, Management and Economics direction), corresponding to disciplines such as Business Administration (A-) and Management Science and Engineering (A), which have certain competitiveness among similar liberal arts majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts-related majors such as Law, Finance/Economics/Economy are in a state of differentiation and wait-and-see, with popularity lower than engineering. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category examinees in Guangxi is about 127,800 (an increase of about 7.2% from 119,200 in 2025), expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing and recruits across provinces. There is no separate statistics for the proportion of History Category enrollment in Guangxi in 2025; the overall Guangxi enrollment proportion is about 2.17%.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 633 and the 2026 plan expansion of 23.5%, which theoretically should cause the ranking to move backward (numerical increase), but the increase of about 7.2% in History Category examinees offsets this. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 692, with a range of 608–776.
